title: Looking for Category Manager at Zostel

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Zostel
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zostel family as a Category Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
